title: SailCompass: Towards Reproducible and Robust Evaluation for Southeast Asian Languages
abstract: We introduce SailCompass, a reproducible and robust evaluation framework for Southeast Asian (SEA) languages covering 8 tasks across 14 datasets in Indonesian, Vietnamese, and Thai. We evaluate SEA-specialized LLMs (SeaLLM, Sailor, Sea-Lion, Typhoon) against general LLMs and find that SEA-specialized models still outperform general models, although the gap has narrowed.

claims.statement: With manipulated training, the model shows a significant 17.2% improvement with prompt LiTiLo.
A balanced language distribution is important for developing better SEA-specialized LLMs.

commands: python evaluate.py --model seallm --lang id vi th --tasks all
